Title: Introducing Claude 3.5 Sonnet

URL Source: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-3-5-sonnet

Markdown Content:
# Introducing Claude 3.5 Sonnet

Today we are releasing Claude 3.5 Sonnet, our most capable model yet.
It substantially improves on the prior generation across reasoning,
code, mathematics, and visual understanding benchmarks.

Claude 3.5 Sonnet is now available for free on Claude.ai and the
Claude iOS app. Claude Pro and Team plan subscribers can access it
with significantly higher rate limits. It is also available via the
Anthropic API, Amazon Bedrock, and Google Cloud Vertex AI.

The model costs $3 per million input tokens and $15 per million
output tokens, with a 200K token context window. We are also
publishing detailed safety documentation and updated usage guidance
in our developer documentation portal.
